name: Sugar and Spice and Everything Nice Granola
description: This easy-to-make granola is sweetened with brown sugar and accented with notes of cinnamon and nutmeg.
instructions: Mix oats, sugar, nuts, cinnamon, and nutmeg together in a large bowl.
In a large microwave safe measuring cup, melt butter on high, about 1 minute.
Pour honey into measuring cup with melted butter and stir to combine.
Pour into bowl with oats and sugar.
Transfer mixture onto a rimmed baking sheet or a 9x13 baking dish.
Bake at 325°F until toasted and golden brown, about 20 minutes.
Remove from oven and let cool on a wire rack.
Once cool, break up any large pieces and transfer to a large container with an airtight lid.
Add raisins and stir to combine.
